MOTION For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amy MacLear, Esq. and David Serrano, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP, Tel. 415.986.5900, for defendant and moving party;
Caitlin Scott, Esq. and Michael Resnick, Esq. of Strategic Legal Practices, Tel. 310.929.4900, for plaintiff and opposing party, by Court Call.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter as not argued. The parties represented to the Court that they have reached a resolution upon stipulated orders. Therefore, the Court vacated the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion For Protective Order. The parties shall prepare the stipulation and order and submit it to the court. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: David Disbrow, CSR #7768, Tel. 415.298.1538, email: david415@yahoo.com.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Caitlin Scott, Esq. and Michael Resnick, Esq. of Strategic Legal Practices, Tel. 310.929.4900, for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;
Amy MacLear, Esq. and David Serrano, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP, Tel. 415.986.5900, for defendant.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter as not argued. The parties represented to the Court that they have reached a resolution upon stipulated orders. Therefore, the Court vacated the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF LISA ALLAIRE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One. The parties shall prepare the stipulation and order and submit it to the court. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: David Disbrow, CSR #7768, Tel. 415.298.1538, email: david415@yahoo.com.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
